segments.text_en: Self-adornment and resolve to approach Enki
evidence: She put the cu-gura, the desert crown, on her head.
she praised herself, full of delight at her genitals
I myself shall speak coaxingly to Enki, in the abzu, in Eridug
I shall utter a plea to the lord Enki.
It shall never escape me that I have been neglected by him who has had sex.

segments.text_en: Journey to Eridug and the welcoming banquet
evidence: the maiden Inana, holy Inana, directed her steps all by herself towards Enki's abzu in Eridug
Enki, the king of the abzu, who ... knew all about her enterprise
offer her butter cake to eat. Let her be served cool refreshing water. Pour beer for her
make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house
He welcomed holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An.
Enki and Inana were drinking beer together in the abzu
enjoying the taste of sweet wine
The bronze aga vessels were filled to the brim
the two of them started a competition, drinking from the bronze vessels of Urac

segments.text_en: Enki grants the divine powers to Inana
markers: in the name of my power
evidence: I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter
Holy Inana received heroism, power, wickedness, righteousness, the plundering of cities
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter
Holy Inana received deceit, the rebel lands, kindness, being on the move, being sedentary.
Holy Inana received wisdom, attentiveness, holy purification rites

segments.text_en: Inana recounts the powers she has received
evidence: He has given me righteousness. He has given me the plundering of cities.
He has given me deceit. He has given me the rebel lands.
He has given me wisdom. He has given me attentiveness.
He has given me strife. He has given me triumph. He has given me counselling.

segments.text_en: Enki sobers as Inana embarks on the Boat of Heaven
evidence: But holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven.
The Boat of Heaven had already left the quay.
As the effects of the beer cleared from father Enki who had drunk beer
Since she said that she would not yet depart from here for Unug Kulaba ... can I still reach her?

segments.text_en: Enki discovers the missing divine powers
evidence: Where are the office of en priest, the office of lagal priest, divinity, the great and good crown, the royal throne?
My master has given them to his daughter.
Where are the standard, the quiver, sexual intercourse, kissing, prostitution
Where are forthright speech, deceitful speech, grandiloquent speech ... the holy tavern?
in the house of Enki should not forget a word
By the bolt of the temple door, a frog spoke.
Enki grasped the frog by his right paw.
He gave ...... to the bird of heaven. He gave ...... to the fish of the subterranean waters.

segments.text_en: The sevenfold pursuit of the Boat of Heaven
evidence: Go now! The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
What your father said was very serious. What Enki spoke was very serious.
How could my father have changed what he said to me?
Now as these words were still in her mouth, he got the enkum to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven.
So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
today you have brought the Boat of Heaven to the Gate of Joy, to Unug Kulaba
Now there will be rejoicing in our city
The king shall slaughter bulls, shall sacrifice sheep.
The foreign lands shall declare my greatness. My people shall utter my praise.
it passed magnificently along the street. It reached the maiden's house

segments.text_en: Enki's recognition of the transferred powers
evidence: Where has the Boat of Heaven reached now? ... It has just now reached the White Quay.
Inana, you have brought with you the office of en priest
you have brought with you sexual intercourse, you have brought with you kissing, you have brought with you prostitution
you have brought with you forthright speech, you have brought with you deceitful speech
you have brought with you the art of song, you have brought with you venerable old age

segments.text_en: Inana names the places along the route
evidence: she named it with the name "The house Ganzer is rebuilt"
she named that place with the name "Potsherds and scrap metal (?)"
Where the boat came to dock at the quay, she named that place with the name "White Quay"
she named that place with the name "Blue Quay"
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman.
Why has this one now entered here? ...... taking the divine powers from me?
May there be ...... a festival!
may ...... your city, Eridug ......, and has indeed restored ......
